title: The Platform
text:
# The Platform

## Discover. Hire. Develop.

Unlock the potential of your candidates with assessments, interviews, and development tools, all within an easy-to-use platform backed by validated science.

Book a Demo 
 

Criteri platform

Criteria platform mobile

### Make better people decisions across the entire talent lifecycle.

assess icon

### Assess

Identify high potential candidates

Learn More

interview icon

### Interview

Make interviews fairer and faster

Learn More

develop icon

### Develop

Build high-performing teams

Learn More

## Assess

Get clearer insights about your candidates with the most robust and comprehensive portfolio of assessments, designed and validated to drive tangible results.

Explore Assessments

### Powerful insights at your fingertips

### See results in real-time

The moment a candidate completes the assessments, you can view the results in the platform or get the reports right in your email.

Real-time results feature

### Intuitive score reports

We make science accessible with score reports that are easy to understand, giving you actionable insights immediately. No need for hours of training to interpret a report!

Sample score reports

### Analyze and compare your candidate pool

Use our tools to compare your candidates based on their scores. You can also establish custom baselines using results from your current workforce.

Compare candidates feature

### Manage your candidate pipeline

Within our platform, you can send emails to your candidates, move them through the hiring pipeline, and even send them reminders to complete their assessments.

Manage pipeline feature

### Measure metrics that matter

Track hiring metrics and candidate feedback using Criteria’s reporting and analytics capabilities. Monitor your recruiting efficiency and optimize your hiring process with a data-driven approach.

analytics dashboard

### Your candidates are in good hands

Candidates can take the tests on any device

### Candidates can take the tests on any device

Our flexible candidate assessment platform enables candidates to take the assessments on any device, from desktop to mobile and tablet.

Our candidate support team is here to help

### Our candidate support team is here to help

We offer support for your candidates if any technical issues should arise. Our candidate support team is available by phone and email.

Create a branded assessment experience

### Create a branded assessment experience

Add your logo and branding style to our candidate assessment platform to establish a cohesive, on-brand experience for your incoming applicants.

## Get Started for Free

Test drive our user-friendly assessment platform

Start a Free Trial

## Interview

Get to know your candidates with seamless interview solutions that help you plan, organize, and conduct structured interviews, all in one place.

### Two Powerful Solutions:

icon for Criteria's Video Interview tool

### Video Interviewing

Meet candidates at scale with one-way, pre-recorded video interviews and scenario-based assessments. 
 

Learn More

Criteria's live interview tool

### Live Interviewing

Plan, organize, and conduct live structured interviews with a solution that enhances your existing process. 
 

Learn More

### ✧ *Plus:* AI-powered Interview Scoring ✧

Shortlist your candidates instantly with Interview Intelligence, the add-on solution that scores video interviews automatically with the same level of scientific rigor that we bring to our assessments. 

Learn more

## Develop

Set your hires up for success with Develop™, the talent development solution that measures, analyzes, and improves team performance. 

Explore Develop

team feedback pulses icon

### Team Feedback Pulses

Quickly assess 17 team performance drivers to uncover employee sentiment and team strengths. Improve key areas one by one with the targeted skills library.  

personality insights icon

### Personality Insights

Empower your team with data-driven insights into their work strengths and team dynamics, along with guides on how to collaborate better with their peers. 

coach bo icon

### Customized Coaching 

Access 24/7 guidance with Coach Bo, the AI-powered chat bot that delivers on-demand advice for overwhelmed managers or individuals looking to level up their skills.

## We fit into your existing hiring process

Our flexible technology makes it possible for you to seamlessly integrate assessments into your current systems and processes. We partner with a wide range of ATS and HRIS platforms to provide streamlined integrations.

Our Integrations

*Criteria has the best array of tests out there, so it was a no-brainer to reach out to them when I moved companies.*

Christopher Fort

Human Resources Manager at Blue River PetCare

*Criteria is an essential component of our business. We wouldn't have such a quality talent pool without it.*

VP of Operations & Business Development

*Working with their supportive team has been seamless for us and the system is very user-friendly.*

Global Director of Talent Acquisition at FirstService Residential

*I think what has set Criteria apart, to me, has been the excellent customer service.*

Recruitment Advisor at Queensland Corrective Services

*The platform is user-friendly and easy to navigate, making the assessment process seamless for the project team as well as the applicants.*

Vishakha Jha

Director of Education at Tech Council of Delaware

*These assessments build a rich pipeline of talent and save time in the short and long term.*

Simon Young

Head of Service Operations at Edenred PayTech

## Ready to make every hire a strategic asset and every team a powerhouse? 

Schedule a demo and test drive the user-friendly talent platform.  
 

Book a Demo
